_readme: SAMPLE — 'where I'm going' vs 'where I want to be going'; the gap is the instrument.

statements.text: make one small tool a month that a stranger actually uses
learn hardware well enough to build the pocket synth for real
finish the things I start before starting the next

aspiration.note: Every line here is yours to overwrite.

projection.coneNote: projected from monthly build-share and shipping cadence, widened by measured volatility
exceptions: three launches clustered in one month

gap.label: the gap
gap.reading: aims to finish; the record shows starting is the stronger habit
